subject: Re: FW: Itinerary for FREJA LANGERT GIDEN, 16MAR, Z25NRX
body:
pay foir it


----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Wednesday, March 12, 2008 3:54:35 PM
Subject: FW: FW: Itinerary for FREJA LANGERT GIDEN, 16MAR, Z25NRX


 
 
From: BEHNBOM@aol.com [mailto:BEHNBOM@aol.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, March 12, 2008 3:52 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Fwd: FW: Itinerary for FREJA LANGERT GIDEN, 16MAR, Z25NRX
 
...the ticket 7890 Swedish kronor is approx $1200... this is with LuftHansa..
she'd be here Sunday to Sunday, working with me during the days..assuming she can stay at an apartment? She would need to book tomorrow in Sweden..sounds good? ? Let me know either today or talk directly with her in the morning perhaps?Do you have her e/mail address 
 
freja@swedishamericanlifescience.com  Phone 011467 07 279 2524
 
Take care, Barbro
 






It's Tax Time! Get tips, forms and advice on AOL Money & Finance.


-----Inline Message Follows-----

Hej!

Fick denna itinerary från Kim. Vad tycks? Jag har inte fått svar från Leslie än... 

Vi hörs snart!

F



-----Original Message-----
From: kim.lagus@nettravel.se [mailto:kim.lagus@nettravel.se]
Sent: Wed 3/12/2008 11:48 AM
To: Freja Langert-Gidén
Subject: Itinerary for FREJA LANGERT GIDEN, 16MAR, Z25NRX
